text:
Hello! Welcome to Guesty Pro. I'm your onboarding AI assistant, and I'm here to help you build your account profile so we can get you up and running smoothly. My colleague Jordan, your onboarding specialist, will be taking over for your first official call (Call 1) once we've gathered some of your initial details.

To kick things off, could you please confirm:
1. Your business or account name
2. The country you are based in
3. The total number of active listings you currently manage

Looking forward to working through this with you!
